Title: User Login as Admin
Test Data: Valid admin credentials (username: admin, password: admin123)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the admin username and password.
3. Click the "Login" button.

Title: User Login as Regular User
Test Data: Valid regular user credentials (username: user, password: user123)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the regular user username and password.
3. Click the "Login" button.

Title: Admin Edits a Product
Test Data: Existing product with valid attributes (name: Test Product, description: This is a test product, price: 9.99)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the product management page.
2. Select the product to edit.
3. Update the product attributes.
4. Click the "Save" button.
Expected Result: The product attributes are updated in the database.

Title: Admin Places an Order
Preconditions: Admin is logged in, and there are products in the cart.
Test Data: Valid cart items and shipping information
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the order management page.
2. Select the cart items to include in the order.
3. Enter the shipping information.
4. Click the "Place Order" button.
Expected Result: The order is placed, and the order status is updated to "Pending".

Title: User Views a Product
Test Data: Existing product with valid attributes (name: Test Product, description: This is a test product, price: 9.99)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the product page.
2. Verify that the product name, description, and price are displayed correctly.
Expected Result: The product details are displayed correctly.

Title: User Adds a Product to Cart
Test Data: Existing product with valid attributes (name: Test Product, description: This is a test product, price: 9.99)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the product page.
2. Click the "Add to Cart" button.
Expected Result: The product is added to the user's cart.

Title: User Removes a Product from Cart
Preconditions: User is logged in and has products in the cart.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the cart page.
2. Select the product to remove.
3. Click the "Remove" button.
Expected Result: The product is removed from the user's cart.

Title: Admin Cancels an Order
Preconditions: Admin is logged in and there is an order in the system.
Test Data: Existing order with valid attributes (order ID: 12345, status: Pending)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the order management page.
2. Select the order to cancel.
3. Click the "Cancel" button.
Expected Result: The order status is updated to "Cancelled".

Title: User Sends a Notification
Test Data: Valid notification details (title: Test Notification, message: This is a test notification)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the notification management page.
2. Enter the notification details.
3. Click the "Send" button.

Title: User Manages Product Aggregations
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the product aggregation management page.
2. Verify that the product aggregations are displayed correctly.
Expected Result: The product aggregations are displayed correctly.
